pages.title: Recognizing an Encounter
pages.text: Cities are full of abandoned buildings, and many have become infected. Their containers remain locked while the encounter is active, and the building announces when it is clear. Treat every intact structure as uncertain until you have checked it.

pages.title: Regular Sites
pages.text: A regular site chooses a persistent target of 8 to 15 zombie or husk kills. By default, the full population is placed as you approach and is not replaced after a kill.$(br2)Server operators can instead select wave mode, which maintains up to 4 active enemies and checks replacements every 10s.

pages.title: Boss Sites
pages.text: After the regular kill target is reached, there is a chance that a Brute will emerge. A short warning precedes its arrival. Enemies already in the building may remain, but no new regular replacements are created.

pages.title: Safe Clearing
pages.text: Work from a defensible edge and avoid opening too many floors at once. Reaching the counter is not permission to ignore loaded enemies. At a boss site, use the warning to reload, create distance, and choose a route that can survive the Brute's rock attack.
